column2: Coordinating with ATSU for RPAS Operations
column3: ['Verify that the user is a CAA flight-ops inspector. ', 'Coordinate with the ATSU for RPAS operations. ', 'Verify that the ATSU can monitor RPAS operations. ', 'Verify that the ATSU can provide input on RPAS operations. ']
column4: ["The system confirms the user's identity as a CAA flight-ops inspector. ", 'Successful communication and coordination between the inspector and the ATSU is established, allowing them to discuss RPAS operations. ', "The system displays real-time or recorded data showing the ATSU's ability to monitor the RPAS's position, altitude, speed, etc. ", 'The inspector receives and acknowledges feedback from the ATSU, and observes any adjustments made to the RPAS operation as needed. ']
